name: Lightspeed EVO Powersports & Marine Dealer API
what_it_does: Lightspeed EVO REST API for powersports, marine, and RV dealer management system (DMS). Enables AI agents to manage vehicle and unit inventory with VIN tracking, process sales and F&I (finance and insurance) transactions, handle parts and accessories catalog management, manage service department scheduling and work orders, access customer and dealer financial data, integrate with OEM manufacturer systems for warranty and parts ordering, and connect dealer data with digital marketing and lead management platforms.
use_cases: Managing powersports and marine unit inventory from dealer operations agents
Processing F&I transactions and financing from deal desk automation agents
Managing parts catalog and service work orders from service department agents
Integrating inventory with digital marketing platforms from lead generation agents
not_for: Automotive franchised dealers without powersports/marine focus
General retail without vehicle or unit serialized inventory
Agriculture equipment dealers without powersports/marine dealer workflows
best_when: A powersports dealer, marine dealer, or RV dealer using Lightspeed EVO wants AI agents to automate inventory management, F&I processing, service scheduling, and OEM integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: F&I and financing data includes consumer credit and loan information regulated by FTC and CFPB. Vehicle sales data involves titling and registration compliance. Warranty claims require OEM compliance.

auth.notes: Lightspeed EVO uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Dealer-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Note: Lightspeed EVO (CDK-acquired 2017, then separated) is distinct from Lightspeed Commerce (retail/golf platform). API documentation limited.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — dealer management system subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-dealer pricing; enterprise pricing for dealer groups
pricing.notes: Sioux Falls, South Dakota. Founded 2000. Market leader for powersports and marine DMS. 4,400+ dealers across US and Canada. CDK Global acquired 2017, then spun off. Competes with Aspen DMS and Infinity DMS for powersports market. Honda, Yamaha, Kawasaki, Sea-Doo OEM integrations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: F&I and consumer credit data regulated by FTC and CFPB
No public MCP server — REST API with limited public documentation
No webhooks — requires polling for inventory and deal updates
FTC Safeguards Rule compliance — dealer customer financial data requires specific security controls
Distinct from Lightspeed Commerce — different company, different API, same brand name causes confusion
OEM integrations (Honda, Yamaha, etc.) have separate data exchange protocols
agent_readiness.security_notes: Dealer F&I and consumer credit data. PCI-DSS, FTC Safeguards Rule. API key + OAuth2. US/Canadian data residency. Consumer credit protection compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Dealer F&I and consumer financial data. PCI-DSS, FTC Safeguards. API key + OAuth2. US/Canadian residency. FTC compliance.
